---
id: reset-tasks
title: "Reset all tasks"
description: "Resets the state of all background tasks, clearing any error or stale running states. Returns an HTML fragment."
sidebar_label: "Reset all tasks"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/tasks/reset"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resets the state of all background tasks, clearing any error or stale running states. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
